headlines.title: Mother of four of Musk’s children, Shivon Zilis, takes the stand at OpenAI trial
headlines.description: Shivon Zilis described her experience serving on OpenAI's board while beginning a relationship with billionaire Elon Musk, one of the company's co-founders.

headlines.title: OpenAI co-founder says he feared Musk would 'physically attack' him
headlines.description: Co-founder Greg Brockman said he had a tense confrontation with Musk after there was a disagreement about potential equity shares in OpenAI.

headlines.title: Pennsylvania suing AI company after chatbot allegedly posed as a licensed doctor
headlines.description: An artificial intelligence company poses a threat to "vulnerable Pennsylvanians," state officials said after one of the company's chatbots was accused of posing as a doctor with the means to prescribe medication.

headlines.title: OpenAI co-founder grilled at Musk trial: 'You just happen to be $30 billion richer?'
headlines.description: OpenAI co-founder and President Greg Brockman disclosed in a trial Monday that his stake in the firm is worth nearly $30 billion.

headlines.title: A 'Devil Wears Prada 2' meme that viewers thought was AI slop was actually made by a human
headlines.description: What some viewers thought was an AI-generated meme in “The Devil Wears Prada 2” was actually drawn by a human artist

headlines.title: Iran Says Its Reviewing 14-Point US Proposal to End the War
headlines.description: An American fighter jet attacked an Iranian tanker in the Gulf of Oman as it tried to break through the U.S. military blockade and make its way to an Iranian port, according to the U.S. Central Command. It comes as Iran says it’s deliberating a response to what the Wall Street Journal describes as a one page, 14-point U.S. proposal to end the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY from Jerusalem.

headlines.title: Kamala Harris wants the DNC to release its autopsy report of the 2024 campaign
headlines.description: Amid turmoil over the party’s future, Kamala Harris has been privately sounding out confidants about her own prospects.

headlines.title: Elon Musk testifies at OpenAI trial
headlines.description: Elon Musk testified in a landmark trial between himself and OpenAI. Musk claims Altman, his onetime associate, had betrayed the altruistic principles the AI company they co-founded was built on.

headlines.title: Jury selection begins in Elon Musk's trial against OpenAI's Sam Altman
headlines.description: Jury selection began in Elon Musk’s civil trial against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. NBC News’ Brian Cheung explains how both sides will try to make their case and how the jury selection is unfolding.

headlines.title: Get an Inside Look at the 'Air Taxi' Set to Revolutionize Travel
headlines.description: An electric-powered Air Taxi, created by California-based Joby, is a cross between a plane and a helicopter and it could revolutionize how we get around, turning a potentially hourslong trip into a short 10-minute ride — all for the price of an Uber. Reporting for TODAY, NBC’s Sam Brock shares a first-hand look at the future of travel and how soon they're expected to launch.

headlines.title: Sony AI's table-tennis-playing robot makes history by beating elite human players
headlines.description: Ace, a ping-pong-playing robot, is the first to beat elite human players in a competitive sport, according to Sony AI. It's a big milestone for robotics that could extend beyond sports. NBC News' Emilie Ikeda reports.

headlines.title: Spelman College students invent a way for plants to talk with the help of AI
headlines.description: If plants could talk, what would they say? That’s what students at Spelman College are finding out with their project PlantGPT. The device uses artificial intelligence that lets you have conversations with your houseplants about their current needs using real-time data. These students hope to bring the device to plant owners and eventually farmers.
